text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Fan Fest is a celebration held for
Umamusume fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And T.M. Opera O has prepared something
special just for it...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Musical theater, naturally! An operetta, in case
you were still in the dark!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I have assembled an all-star cast from my
generation to announce our presence to the
world!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The star playing the role of King is no other
than... me, of course!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And the king's right-hand servant, Knight A, shall
be played by... Meisho Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I'll... uh... try really hard!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um... I'm happy to play the role of your friend...
but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: What I really wanted to do was... Aaah—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And my next subordinate in the role of Knight B
is...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega, aka Ayabe! Last time we saw each
other was during the Classics, no?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I... took time off because I had no choice. I still
haven't recovered...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if this is okay—acting in a play when I
can't race.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Your character, Ayabe, is a knight who turns on
me and beats me to a pulp.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Well then... count me in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the curtain rises on the trio's opera!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! So long as I am here with you two by my
side, the future of this kingdom remains bright!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We will sweep away the older generation's umbral
shadow that hangs over the lands!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: We will sweep it away...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
The older generation's shadow... But that means
Grass Wonder and them...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I don't know about this... I... Ohhhh...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, Ayabe, this is the scene where you commit
your betrayal.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Declare your conviction on high and become my
enemy.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Okay, here I go...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, how naive, Opera O—not to notice the
snake in your own court...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Your true foe isn't the previous generation. Your
true foe is...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: MEEEEE!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh? Doto?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hm? That was not in the script. Has Doto turned this into... opera improv?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The unexpected twist stuns even Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
For... for a long time now, I've wanted... to face
off against you!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't accept your offer at first... So the role I
wanted was passed to Ayabe.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
It tore me up inside... Even if for just a moment, I
wanted you... to see me!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I've trained a lot. I've been in lots of races. Now...
I'm so close to G1!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I might not make it to the spring Tenno Sho, but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I can definitely make it to the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I want to run with you, Opera O! But this time, as
your opponent!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: So... race me! PRETTY PLEASE!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Doto, I never...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Doto is really showing her heart, unspoken
feelings now bursting free.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, tell me it isn't true! Doto, whom I'd
believed to be my friend, is a conniving traitor!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What has become of our ironclad kinship?!
Doomed. Our generation is utterly doomed.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Before our battle against the older generation
could commence, our consortium has degraded
into chaos and disarray!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hyeeeee! Opera O, I'm sorry! I... I just...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Woe is me... Wait, could it be?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... Destiny has shown its cards. This is the
curse of the royal blood that runs through my
veins!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do your worst, Doto! I, T.M. Opera O, shall
neither flee nor hide!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! Go forth and spark the civil war that
will rend our nation in two!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huuuh?! Are you happy or angry? I can't tell!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't worry too much. This one lives for
drama.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Doto... I'm rooting for you.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Ayabe...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Your effort... isn't in vain.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I mean... you just got me out of this. Heh, I pass
the baton to you.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-okay...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now that you have made your declaration, there
is no turning back. You have become my enemy!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A rift runs through this generation of ours... And it
grows larger by the minute.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You must face me now, before the showdown
against our predecessors can take place!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-okay! Let's do this, Opera Ooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The new turn of events greatly increases the
excitement in the audience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before Opera O can challenge the generation
before her, she must settle the disarray now
plaguing her own.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Murmur, murmur...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some discourse has begun brewing in the stands,
though.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I don't think they're acting. Like, that was a
real fight, wasn't it?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
No way! Who'd pick a fight with Ope when she's
so popular? Won't all her fans be ticked off?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Huh... S-so many people are looking at me... But
why? Urghh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fans start glaring down at Meisho Doto once they
realize she wasn't acting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The number of die-hard T.M. Opera O fans has
grown a lot recently. And now they've found a
target.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Aaagh... I'm sorry... R-really...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
If I was too out of line, then we can... go back to
the way it was.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Do not stand down, Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-Opera O?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You took the stage of your own volition, so you
mustn't!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You must not retreat! Maintain your courage!
Step onto the stage in this momentous occasion
as the knight you are!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And a message to my fans—how pathetic!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A fiery Opera O tears into the audience.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
An enemy she may be, but she deserves your
love. If you were my fans, then you would open
your hearts to be as unprejudiced as mine.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Besides! A work of theater without twists and
surprises is the very definition of boring!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yes, Meisho Doto is both my friend and my foe...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As with the older racers who stand in my way, I
wish for you to accept her as a part of this tale!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hear me well! Send your best wishes to the full
cast of this wonderful age!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: That was awesome, Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Fan D
text_block_list.text: Spoken like a true star!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera O...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Doto, there is no taking back the words you
gallantly declared.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You must face me now, before the showdown
against our predecessors can take place!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-okay! Let's do this, Opera Ooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the air of a true king, T.M. Opera O brings
the play to a close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has also gained a new and important mission
with today's surprise—to settle competition
among her own generation before taking on the
old.
